name: R5-V1: skirt + sudden-change site — falls green at crest, no pale skirt (cell 1,-46)
R5-V2: shore clarity — no lensing band, thin lap line, distortion over submerged bushes
R5-V3: plunge pool — drop in: swims in the pool, never in mid-air beside the fall
R5-V4: crest handoff from above — sheet spills over its own edge seamlessly
S2: coastline curves + no orphan slivers + no see-under gap
S3: river is a bounded channel, no floating sections
